case_title: ANDREW HUNTER VS. DARREN PALM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,400.00 FILED BY HUNTER, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT PALM, DARREN ROGERS, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNTER, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALM, DARREN ROGERS, LISA $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-10-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT LISA ROGERS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER (SC105A) ORDER GRANTING VACATING JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNTER, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT PALM, DARREN ROGERS, LISA
CORRESPONDENSE RECIEVED RE: WRONG JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT PALM, DARREN
